hero.text: Every day is a new beginning.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today is a day for action, Aries! Your energy is high, and you'll feel motivated to tackle tasks head-on.
aries.love: A spark of passion may ignite today, making your connection with a loved one deeper and more meaningful.
aries.career: Opportunities for advancement are likely to come your way. Don’t hesitate to showcase your skills.

taurus.general: Today focuses on stability and comfort. Take time to appreciate the little things.
taurus.love: You may find joy in the company of loved ones, reinforcing bonds that bring you comfort.
taurus.career: Patience will be your ally today in professional matters. Stay grounded and organized.

gemini.general: Expect some surprise communication today that could lead to new opportunities.
gemini.love: A meaningful conversation may strengthen your current relationship. Open up your heart.
gemini.career: Your adaptability will shine, allowing you to navigate changes in the workplace effectively.

cancer.general: Emotional currents may run high today; focus on self-care and nurturing your spirit.
cancer.love: A special moment with someone close could create lasting memories. Cherish these times.
cancer.career: Cooperation with colleagues will lead to a productive day. Collaboration is key.

leo.general: Your leadership qualities are highlighted today. Step up and let your voice be heard.
leo.love: Romantic gestures can rekindle the spark in a relationship. Don’t hold back your affection.
leo.career: Taking initiative could put you in a favorable light with superiors. Shine bright!

virgo.general: Today is ideal for organization. Taking charge of your space will bring you peace.
virgo.love: A practical approach to your relationship could resolve any misunderstandings from the past.
virgo.career: Attention to detail will pay off, particularly in project management. Focus and execute.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
professional.author: Bo Bennett

professional.text: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
professional.author: George Eliot

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Stay close to anything that makes you glad you’re alive.
captions.author: Hafez

captions.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
captions.author: T.S. Eliot

captions.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
captions.author: Nelson Mandela

captions.text: In the end, we will remember not the words of our enemies, but the silence of our friends.
captions.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

captions.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The real danger is that we don’t learn how to use technology effectively.
tech.author: Rafael M. Yuste

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Ada Lovelace

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: I'm on the patch to self-improvement. Sort of.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me KitKat ads!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: The greatest test of faith is when you don’t get what you want.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
faith.author: Christian D. Larson

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: You can’t make a miracle happen without a little faith.
faith.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: We do not learn from experience... we learn from reflecting on experience.
wisdom.author: John Dewey

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you'd rather have been talking.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain
